title: CommandResult
description: Structured result of a command execution (ADR-0003, 03-data-model.md § 2.4). exitCode is the verification signal (RD-10, INV-17).

exitCode.description: Process exit code; 0 = success for the unit of work (RD-10).

stdout.description: May be truncated when `truncated` is true (ADR-0006).

truncated.description: True if output exceeded NFR-OUTPUT-MAX-INLINE; full output in the event log.

fullRef.description: Pointer to full output in the log when truncated (AC-19.2/19.3).
